name: code-mode
description: Persistent, typechecked script library for coding agents. Exposes search/run/save/queryTypes/listSdks over MCP and keeps the SQLite index in sync via a PostToolUse hook.

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '/.code-mode/'; then cwd="$PWD" && cd / && node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/start.mjs" reindex --path "$cwd" --paths "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi
